nasb.text: However, in the first year of Cyrus king of Babylon, King Cyrus issued a decree to rebuild this house of God.

esv.text: However, in the first year of Cyrus king of Babylon, Cyrus the king made a decree that this house of God should be rebuilt.

cnv.text: 然而在巴比倫王古列元年，古列王下令重建這　神的殿。

ccb.text: 然而，巴比伦王塞鲁士在其统治元年，降旨重建这座上帝的殿。
